creator: daniel@roe.ch
text:
Please remove my maintainership from the following list of ports.
Due to non-IT-related volunteer work, I am unable to spend enough
time with FreeBSD to properly maintain ports anymore.  I've also
noted in the list below which ports are in need of attention, in
case someone is interested in working on them.

games/spicetrade
graphics/metapixel
graphics/pngrewrite
mail/dma               (needs update)
math/msieve            (needs update and fixing)
security/fiked
security/fragrouter
security/md4coll
security/md5coll
security/nmap          (needs update and fixing)
security/sig2dot
security/zenmap        (needs update and fixing)
sysutils/pv
x11/swarp
